bridge.title: Add EcoTech bridge
bridge.description: Enter the Multi Reef bridge's address. Leave the default if you flashed it as multireef.local.

redsea_pick.title: Select your ReefDose
redsea_pick.description: These Red Sea ReefDose dosers were found on your network. Pick one, or choose manual entry.

redsea_manual.title: Enter ReefDose IP
redsea_manual.description: No ReefDose was found automatically, or you chose manual entry. Enter its LAN IP address. Reserve a static IP for it in your router first.

pick.title: Select your device
pick.description: These Reef Factory devices were found on your network. Pick one, or choose manual entry.

manual.title: Enter device IP
manual.description: No device was found automatically, or you chose manual entry. Enter the LAN IP address. Reserve a static IP for it in your router first.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device. Check the IP and that it is on the same network.
error.not_supported: That device responded but is not a supported device for this option (Reef Factory serials start with RFKH/RFDP; Red Sea must be a ReefDose).

abort.not_ours: Discovered device is not a configured Reef Factory device.

init.title: Multi Reef options
init.description: Logs raw WebSocket frames from the device to the Home Assistant log for troubleshooting. Leave off during normal use.
